Because it's either this job or be homeless. I'm literally trying to find another job, but it's been nearly impossible. The only hit I've gotten since September literally ghosted me. Scheduled an interview, never showed, and never responded when I tried to reach out.

I got considered by a place on Indeed, I.e. next steps, then showed up a week later and dropped off my resume, no one would talk to me, and didn't get the job. Job was well within my wheelhouse.

Zillow says 72% of buyers only contact one agent. ONE.

They're picking you based on your Google reviews, your Zillow profile,
and what shows up when they search your name. If your online presence
looks like 2019, you're invisible.

Update your headshot. Get 5 new reviews.
